label: Kick-driven movement — warp distortion + arm spin spike on sub_bass
notes: Added two kick-driven movement responses to glsl_shimmer_dat. (1) Warp amplitude: FBM domain warp multiplier raised from fixed 0.38 to (0.38 + kick*0.28) — at sub_bass peak the portals writhe/distort, boundary becomes organic and pressurized. (2) Rotation speed: rotSpeed += kick*2.0 — arms spin faster on each kick, giving directional swirl motion. Both effects vanish when sub_bass drops back to baseline. Combined with existing brightness flash (uBreathAmt), each kick now produces: flash + writhe + swirl. kickWarp passed as new portal() argument to keep warp separate from chaos-driven parameters.

operations.note: portal() now takes kickWarp argument. warp *= (0.38 + kickWarp*0.28). rotSpeed += kick*2.0.
